title: Product launch sync
transcript:
[00:00] Maya: The goal is to lock the beta launch plan.
[00:18] Leo: We decided to launch the private beta on August 15.
[00:38] Maya: Leo will prepare the onboarding checklist by Friday.
[00:55] Priya: Are the security review slots confirmed?
[01:14] Leo: Risk: the SSO dependency might slip.

actions: prepare the onboarding checklist by Friday
decisions: launch the private beta on August 15

title: Architecture review
transcript:
[00:00] Divya: Today we need to choose the retrieval store.
[00:20] Sam: We chose Qdrant for semantic search.
[00:41] Divya: I'll publish the migration plan by Tuesday.
[01:05] Sam: What is our rollback threshold?
[01:25] Divya: Concern: indexing may exceed the latency budget.

actions: publish the migration plan by Tuesday

title: Customer escalation
transcript:
[00:00] Nia: We are here to resolve the export failure.
[00:25] Omar: We agreed to ship the patch behind a feature flag.
[00:48] Nia: Omar will send the customer an update by EOD.
[01:02] Omar: Is the failure limited to large workspaces?
[01:30] Nia: Blocked: production logs expire after seven days.

actions: send the customer an update by EOD
decisions: ship the patch behind a feature flag

title: Evaluation planning
transcript:
[00:00] Divya: The goal is to finalize our model evaluation.
[00:16] Chen: Decision: use evidence precision as the launch gate.
[00:37] Divya: Chen will label fifty hard examples by Monday.
[00:59] Chen: Should corrections count as partial credit?
[01:18] Divya: Risk: synthetic meetings may inflate performance.

actions: label fifty hard examples by Monday
decisions: use evidence precision as the launch gate

title: Dashboard critique
transcript:
[00:00] Ava: We need to make the intelligence view easier to scan.
[00:22] Ben: Let's put evidence beside every extracted claim.
[00:44] Ava: Ben will prototype the timeline by tomorrow.
[01:00] Ben: Which metric should lead the benchmark card?
[01:20] Ava: Concern: too many charts could hide the actual product.

decisions: put evidence beside every extracted claim
